nodes.name: Trigger Cron (15min)

nodes.notes: GET Liquidations data from Loris Tools

nodes.name: Normalize OI Data
nodes.notes: Normalize OI data to standard schema with regime detection

nodes.notes: Detect trading signals from OI and liquidation data

nodes.name: Format Summary
nodes.notes: Format final summary for display and storage

nodes.notes: Append OI data to history (for trend analysis)

nodes.notes: Load and respond with OI snapshot
